evidence_quotes.quote: nothing about shutting down old servers has to be the end of a games life.

paragraphs.text: I don't see what is so hard about video game publishers allowing the public to continue with games publishers don't want anymore. Let me tell you something: nothing about shutting down old servers has to be the end of a games life. If a server eventually gets shut down, and people volunteer to make their own server or do everything in their power to preserve a game they like, what's wrong with it? But nope, game companies will continue to repeat their patterns of planned obsolesce, and it is utterly ridiculous and unfair to people who want to continue playing despite the company's lack of desire to continue working on and maintaining the game. Please, do something about this.
